calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, July 30, 2008: Arnold Walter Evje, counsel for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic; Sam Meki, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Mia Solvesson, Esquire, by limited scope representation of defendant Christopher Viola, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. The case is settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed with the Court this day. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
